title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
